chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 646 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 08.08.2023. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mrs. Razia Ali Zaman Khan Patoli Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri A.A.G. ----- This petition is pending since 2014, for the appointment of the petitioner for the post of Junior School Teacher. It is claimed that though the petitioner took almost 08 years to file this writ petition, however, his case to be considered in the light of the Judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Government of Punjab v. Sameena Parveen and others [2009 SCMR 01], wherein it is said that if the case of the petitioner and of those whose rights were determined earlier is at par, such relief may also be extended to such litigant. We have perused the file and it appears that the petitioner slept over his right as he has not approached the Court for 08 good years when the Judgment of his colleagues was announced, he then rushed to the Court but by that time the time has lapsed and this petition suffers from laches and hence, the case of the petitioner is not at par with those who earlier availed remedy. The petition, as such, in view of the laches is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE A.
